60157783.title: Curran Hatleberg
60157783.extract: Curran Hatleberg is an American photographer. He attended Yale University and graduated in 2010 with an MFA. Influenced by the American tradition of road photography, Hatleberg's process entails driving throughout the United States and interacting with various strangers in different locales. His work was included in the Whitney Biennial 2019.
